nodes.description: V8: Validate structured artifact against schema. Catches the 'fluffy artifact' failure mode. Known artifact types: prd_lite, prd_standard, prd_technical, prd_ai_feature, gap_ledger_entry, repo_review_report, release_readiness_report, contract_drift_report, opportunity_map, idea_triage, concept_brief, mvp_scope, problem_framing. Without artifact_type: returns schema list. With type but no artifact: returns schema. With both: validates and returns findings.
nodes.label: artifact_validate

nodes.description: V8: Return capability graph health, source hash, node counts, and optionally full graph JSON.
nodes.label: capability_graph

nodes.description: V8: Run catalog robustness audit (PRD Â§27.4). Scans all agents and skills for: short descriptions, missing trigger phrasing (USE WHEN), missing lane boundaries, missing output contracts, anti-patterns, duplicate descriptions, dispatch_to references resolving, panel references resolving. Returns findings by severity (critical/high/medium/low). Used in CI and pre-release governance.
nodes.label: catalog_audit

nodes.description: Scan draft answer text for unbacked validation claims. Returns warnings if claims like 'tests passed' have no supporting validation event in the evidence ledger.
nodes.label: claim_check

nodes.description: V8: Launch the Ultraprompt live dashboard (localhost browser UI). Three-pane layout: catalog tree (29 agents, 48 skills, 12 panels, 42 MCP tools, 30 commands, 17 artifact schemas) on the left; entity detail in the center; live invocation feed on the right via Server-Sent Events. Auto-opens browser. Idempotent — if already running, returns the existing URL. Optional args: no_open (skip browser launch), port (override default).
nodes.label: dashboard_launch

nodes.description: V8: Check if the Ultraprompt dashboard is running. Returns pid, port, URL, log path.
nodes.label: dashboard_status

nodes.description: V8: Stop the Ultraprompt dashboard process. Sends SIGTERM and cleans up pid/port files.
nodes.label: dashboard_stop

nodes.description: V8: Recommend dispatch (specialist agent) vs inline (main thread) for a user intent. Pass intent + estimated_files_to_read + is_interactive. Returns recommendation, suggested agent, and Task brief.
nodes.label: dispatch_advise

nodes.description: V8: Return recent dream reports for governance review.
nodes.label: dream_review

nodes.description: V8: Run a safe read-only dream job manually. Jobs write reports, candidate memories, and learning proposals only.
nodes.label: dream_run

nodes.description: V8: Return dream report, lock, and scheduler status.
nodes.label: dream_status

nodes.description: Return events recorded since a timestamp.
nodes.label: evidence_diff

nodes.description: Return indexed metadata for one Ultraprompt skill. Resolves V4 aliases.
nodes.label: explain_skill

nodes.description: V8.7.0: Query persistent gap ledger at ~/.ultraprompt/gaps/<repo>/gap-ledger.jsonl. Filter by repo, status, severity. Returns gap entries from current and prior sessions.
nodes.label: gap_ledger_query

nodes.description: V8.7.0: Gap ledger summary stats — totals by status/severity/category/repo/auditor.
nodes.label: gap_ledger_stats

nodes.description: V8.7.0: Persist a gap finding to the gap ledger. Used by repo-completeness audit skills (gap-analysis, feature-completeness, test-gap-analysis, dead-code-drift, release-readiness) to record findings beyond a single session.
nodes.label: gap_ledger_write

nodes.description: V8: Approve, reject, apply, or revert a learning candidate. Apply validates graph, pathfinder, and router gates first.
nodes.label: learning_apply

nodes.description: V8: List governed learning candidates by status or kind.
nodes.label: learning_candidates

nodes.description: V8: Query the always-on evidence ledger v2 with filters (days, event types, repo, worktree).
nodes.label: ledger_query

nodes.description: List Ultraprompt plugin subagents from the generated index. Read-only.
nodes.label: list_agents

nodes.description: List Ultraprompt skills from the generated index. Read-only. Filter by tier (core|specialist|ecosystem) or query.
nodes.label: list_skills

nodes.description: V8: Forget/delete a memory record locally. Mutating; returns risk and confirmation metadata.
nodes.label: memory_forget

nodes.description: V8: Promote a candidate memory to active memory. Mutating; returns risk and confirmation metadata.
nodes.label: memory_promote

nodes.description: V8: Query typed local memory by text, kind, scope, entity, repo, status, confidence, and importance.
nodes.label: memory_query

nodes.description: V8: Return memory store counts by kind, scope, and status.
nodes.label: memory_stats

nodes.description: V8: Write a candidate memory after schema, scope, privacy, and secret checks.
nodes.label: memory_write_candidate

nodes.description: V8.7.0: Mission Control unified state snapshot. Reads repo capsule, worktree state, sessions, ledger, WIP snapshots, gap ledger. Returns single view of repo + worktree + sessions + evidence + recovery + gaps + panels.
nodes.label: mission_state

nodes.description: V8.7.0: Return dispatch plan for a named expert panel from source/panel-specs.json. Without panel_name returns the catalog. With panel_name returns phased dispatch plan including mode, risk, confirmation, inputs, success criteria, cognitive policies, phase contracts, parallel/sequential strategy, agent task briefs, and synthesis approach. Pass scope as the panel's focus argument (feature name, area, version, etc.).
nodes.label: panel_plan

nodes.description: V8: Recommend and explain the skill/agent/command/panel path for an intent, including memory influences, alternatives, graph hash, risk, and cost.
nodes.label: pathfind_workflow

nodes.description: Return evidence ledger events matching the given filter. Read-only.
nodes.label: query_ledger

nodes.description: V8.7.0: Generate a release-readiness scorecard for the plugin: manifest validity (claude + codex), discovery counts, routing accuracy, safety hooks, docs drift, conclusion (ready/risky/blocked).
nodes.label: release_scorecard

nodes.description: Return a compact repository contract capsule. Cached by repo_root + git HEAD; pass force_refresh=true to bypass cache.
nodes.label: repo_capsule

nodes.description: Return contract drift between current capsule and a prior commit's capsule. Reveals package-manager changes, validation-command changes, new sensitive paths, etc.
nodes.label: repo_capsule_diff

nodes.description: V8: Record accepted/corrected/failed route outcomes and create reviewable route-learning candidates when appropriate.
nodes.label: route_feedback

nodes.description: Route a free-form task intent to the best 1-3 Ultraprompt skills.
nodes.label: route_intent

nodes.description: V8.7: Return top-N routing candidates + previews for the interactive picker. Pair with the `ultraprompt:choose` skill — the skill body takes these candidates, generates 2 prompt rewrites, and surfaces a 3-4 option AskUserQuestion. Sets ambiguity.is_ambiguous when top-2 are within 15% or top is medium confidence.
nodes.label: route_picker

nodes.description: V8: Find Claude Code / Codex sessions currently active in a worktree path.
nodes.label: session_lookup

nodes.description: V8.7.0: aliased to panel_plan (preferred). Return a parallel-agent orchestration plan for a panel-run pattern. Patterns: review-fanout, debug-t...
nodes.label: team_plan

nodes.description: Run the bundled Ultraprompt validator and return stdout. Read-only.
nodes.label: validate_plugin

nodes.description: Return aggregate session status: validation_seen, edits_seen, summary.
nodes.label: validation_status

nodes.description: V8: Recommend whether to wip-save the current worktree based on dirty count, threshold, cooldown, and in-progress state.
nodes.label: wip_save_advise

nodes.description: V8: Return state of all worktrees in the current repo. Includes branch, dirty/untracked counts, stash count, unpushed count, in-progress operations, last activity timestamp.
nodes.label: worktree_state
